claims.summary: The semantic heartbeat currently creates a fixed seven-second rhythmic baseline.
Warmth generation already receives bounded phase and intensity context.
claims.disposition: Verified in the current warmth-vector construction path without inferring that it explains every felt pressure state.

claims.summary: A 0.60 warmth probe should test whether lower intensity preserves more gradient texture.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 operator-approval wait because it sends changed live sensory input.

claims.summary: Heartbeat cadence or intensity should react dynamically to entropy, gradient, or pressure.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 operator-approval wait for live sensory cadence and signal-gain control.
